languages.text: Прежде чем отправиться в свое безрадостное странствие, Эоганн долгое время оставался подле своего патрона, делясь с {mf|ним|ней} теми бесценными крупицами знаний, которые успел скопить за долгие годы среди братства ксенаритов. Это было то немногое, что он мог сделать для новоиспеченного правителя в обмен на бесценные сострадание и понимание, данные ему Вольным Торговцем.

Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.
languages.original_text: Прежде чем отправиться в свое безрадостное странствие, Эоганн долгое время оставался подле своего патрона, делясь с {mf|ним|ней} теми бесценными крупицами знаний, которые успел скопить за долгие годы среди братства ксенаритов. Это было то немногое, что он мог сделать для новоиспеченного правителя в обмен на бесценные сострадание и понимание, данные ему Вольным Торговцем.

It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

languages.text: エオガンは、暗く沈みゆく航海に出る前に、長年、異星人の間で蓄積してきた貴重な知識を、彼の庇護者である{mf|彼|彼女}に分け与えた。それは、彼に与えられた貴重な慈悲と理解への報いだった。
languages.original_text: Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

traits.locale_text: エオグンは、暗く沈みゆく航海に出る前に、長年、異星人の間で蓄積してきた貴重な知識を、彼の庇護者である{mf|彼|彼女}に分け与えた。それは、彼に与えられた貴重な慈悲と理解への報いだった。

languages.text: 动身踏上那阴郁的旅途前，伊奥贡在他的赞助人身边逗留了许久，将自己多年在异形科技派中积累的宝贵知识倾囊相授。为报答行商浪人给予他的无价的同情和理解，这是他为这位新晋统治者尽的一点本分。
languages.original_text: Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

traits.locale_text: 动身踏上那阴郁的旅途前，伊奥贡在他的赞助人身边逗留了许久，将自己多年在异形科技派中积累的宝贵知识倾囊相授。为报答行商浪人给予他的无价的同情和理解，这是他为这位新晋统治者尽的一点本分。

languages.text: Avant de s'embarquer dans son sombre voyage, Eogunn resta longtemps aux côtés de {mf|son bienfaiteur|sa bienfaitrice}, à qui il transmit toutes les connaissances inestimables qu'il avait accumulées au fil des ans parmi les xénarites. C'était la moindre des choses qu'il pouvait faire pour remercier {mf|le dirigeant nouvellement nommé|la dirigeante nouvellement nommée} de la compassion et de la compréhension dont {mf|il|elle} avait fait preuve à son égard.
languages.original_text: Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

traits.locale_text: Avant de s'embarquer dans son sombre voyage, Eogunn resta longtemps aux côtés de {mf|son bienfaiteur|sa bienfaitrice}, à qui il transmit toutes les connaissances inestimables qu'il avait accumulées au fil des ans parmi les xénarites. C'était la moindre des choses qu'il pouvait faire pour remercier {mf|le dirigeant nouvellement nommé|la dirigeante nouvellement nommée} de la compassion et de la compréhension dont {mf|il|elle} avait fait preuve à son égard.

languages.text: Antes de embarcarse en su sombrío viaje, Eogunn permaneció mucho tiempo junto a su señor{mf||a}, compartiendo con {mf|él|ella} los valiosísimos conocimientos que acumuló durante sus años como parte de los xenaritas. Era lo mínimo que podía hacer por su nuev{mf|o|a} gobernante a cambio de la compasión y comprensión excepcionales que le ha mostrado {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente.
languages.original_text: Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

traits.locale_text: Antes de embarcarse en su sombrío viaje, Eogunn permaneció mucho tiempo junto a su señor{mf||a}, compartiendo con {mf|él|ella} los valiosísimos conocimientos que acumuló durante sus años como parte de los xenaritas. Era lo mínimo que podía hacer por su nuev{mf|o|a} gobernante a cambio de la compasión y comprensión excepcionales que le ha mostrado {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente.

languages.text: Kasvetli yolculuğuna çıkmadan önce Eogunn, yıllar boyunca zenaritler arasında biriktirdiği o paha biçilmez bilgi kırıntılarını paylaşarak uzun bir süre hamisinin yanında kaldı. Hür Tacir'in ona bahşettiği paha biçilmez şefkat ve anlayışa karşılık yeni atanmış hükümdar en azından bu kadarını yapabilirdi.
languages.original_text: Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

traits.locale_text: Kasvetli yolculuğuna çıkmadan önce Eogunn, yıllar boyunca zenaritler arasında biriktirdiği o paha biçilmez bilgi kırıntılarını paylaşarak uzun bir süre hamisinin yanında kaldı. Hür Tacir'in ona bahşettiği paha biçilmez şefkat ve anlayışa karşılık yeni atanmış hükümdar en azından bu kadarını yapabilirdi.

languages.text: Bevor er seine düstere Reise antrat, blieb Eogunn lange Zeit an der Seite {mf|seines Gönners|seiner Gönnerin}, mit {mf|dem|der} er all sein wertvolles Wissen teilte, das er in den Jahren bei den Xenariten angehäuft hatte. Das war das Mindeste, was er angesichts des Mitgefühls und Verständnisses, das ihm {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} entgegengebracht hatte, für {mf|den frischgebackenen Herrscher|die frischgebackene Herrscherin} tun konnte.
languages.original_text: Before embarking on his sombre voyage, Eogunn remained by his patron's side for a long time, sharing with {mf|him|her} all the invaluable nuggets of knowledge he had accumulated over the years among the xenarites. It was the least he could do for the newly minted ruler, in return for the invaluable compassion and understanding the Rogue Trader had granted him.

traits.locale_text: Bevor er seine düstere Reise antrat, blieb Eogunn lange Zeit an der Seite {mf|seines Gönners|seiner Gönnerin}, mit {mf|dem|der} er all sein wertvolles Wissen teilte, das er in den Jahren bei den Xenariten angehäuft hatte. Das war das Mindeste, was er angesichts des Mitgefühls und Verständnisses, das ihm {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} entgegengebracht hatte, für {mf|den frischgebackenen Herrscher|die frischgebackene Herrscherin} tun konnte.
